LanguageData.RB_PavedTile_Transhumanist.description: Concrete tiles with a hexagonal pattern for that ultra-technological look. Cheap, but neutral in terms of looks and slow to build.
LanguageData.RB_PavedTile_Transhumanist.label: paved hex tile
LanguageData.RB_WoodPlankFloor_Transhumanist.descript: Wood plank flooring with a hexagonal pattern for that ultra-technological look. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.RB_WoodPlankFloor_Transhumanist.label: wood hex floor
